# Auto-generated project CMakeLists.txt (esp32) for model: '{{ model_name }}'

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.16)

set(EXTRA_COMPONENT_DIRS
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/{{ robotick_engine_root }}/platforms/esp32/components/robotick-engine"
)

include($ENV{IDF_PATH}/tools/cmake/project.cmake)
project({{ model_name }}-{{ platform }})
